protocol.name: xi_socket_manager_unstable_v1

interface.name: xi_socket_manager_v1
interface.description: If a client has received a privileged socket via WAYLAND_SOCKET, it can use this interface to register additional privileged sockets to pass to child processes.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the manager. This doesn't destroy objects created with the manager.

request.name: register_socket

description.summary: register a socket with the same permissions as the current one

request.description: Registers a new socket with the same permissions as the current one. The socket must be created by the client. After registraton, it can then be passed to a child process via WAYLAND_SOCKET.
